title: pilosella fennica subsp. spathophylla
intro: Pilosella fennica subsp. spathophylla is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Finland and other parts of Northern Europe. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Pilosella fennica subsp. spathophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or using them in a tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
